title: erigeron fluens
intro: Erigeron fluens, also known as fleabane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, providing relief from pain, inflammation, and infections. Herbal preparations of Erigeron fluens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address a range of health concerns, promoting overall well-being and immune function.
